articleTitle: A Culturally Tailored Mobile Health Intervention to Improve Quality of Life in Black Survivors With Prostate Cancer: Protocol for a Stratified Randomized Controlled Trial.
takeaways: This is a protocol paper describing a planned study design rather than reporting actual results or findings
The study will test a culturally-tailored mobile health intervention specifically designed for Black prostate cancer survivors to address quality of life disparities
The intervention will target specific treatment-related symptoms including urinary dysfunction, pain, fatigue, and psychological distress through technology-based self-management tools
The research uses a stratified randomized controlled trial design to evaluate the effectiveness of culturally-adapted mobile health technology for prostate cancer survivorship care
